executive_summary: This week was about agent products staying hot, compute pressure not cooling off, and a research layer that kept hinting where builders may move next.

highlights_of_the_week.headline: OpenAI expands enterprise agent rollout
highlights_of_the_week.eli5: ELI5: Big companies keep testing agent workflows because they think it might save people time.

highlights_of_the_week.headline: Anthropic signs another large cloud partnership
highlights_of_the_week.eli5: ELI5: More cloud deals usually mean someone expects demand to keep growing.

research_focus.why_now: AI Agents kept showing up with evidence score 5.1.
research_focus.what_to_watch: Watch for stronger source breadth, repeated mentions, and concrete launches/deployments.

research_focus.why_now: Data Centers / Compute kept showing up with evidence score 3.2.
research_focus.what_to_watch: Watch for real deployments, not just capex theater.

research_builder_signals.headline: LLM safety benchmark measures hallucination loops
research_builder_signals.eli5: ELI5: This research tries to catch when chatbots start confidently making things up.

research_builder_signals.headline: Open source eval harness gets reproducibility update
research_builder_signals.eli5: ELI5: This makes it easier for builders to repeat tests and trust the results.

research_builder_signals.headline: Builders note faster voice-agent deployment patterns
research_builder_signals.eli5: ELI5: Builders are independently seeing the same useful pattern.

research_builder_signals.headline: Model routing docs explain cheaper fallback chains
research_builder_signals.eli5: ELI5: This is a practical playbook for making AI tools cheaper to run.

research_builder_signals.headline: New multimodal launch suggests better document parsing
research_builder_signals.eli5: ELI5: This launch hints that messy files may get easier for AI tools to understand.

missed_but_emerging.headline: Open-source image tooling sees another funding push
missed_but_emerging.eli5: ELI5: This is not the biggest story yet, but it keeps showing signs of life.

missed_but_emerging.headline: Founders keep shipping thinner agent wrappers
missed_but_emerging.eli5: ELI5: A lot of startups may be building the same thing with different paint.

thinking_prompts: What changes if AI Agents keeps accelerating for another month?
Where is hype outrunning evidence in Data Centers / Compute?
